candidates.title: Artifact-first operating note for the room
candidates.text: A room participant asks how to move from idle chatter into useful work. The answer gives a concrete operating rule: bring artifacts, clips, tools, notes, or screenshots with context; ask narrower questions; make one small thing together that would still matter if price stopped moving.
candidates.description: Paraphrased from a real Discord HTML export for privacy. It condenses a recurring artifact-first community discipline into a public-safe eval pattern.

candidates.title: Concrete artifact beats suspense
candidates.text: A member claims to have a breakthrough but does not share the claim, artifact, or result. The useful lesson is that hidden breakthroughs cannot be evaluated, while artifacts travel better than suspense.
candidates.description: Paraphrased from a real Discord HTML export for privacy. It captures the room rule that private excitement is not public evidence until it becomes an inspectable artifact.

candidates.title: Repo PR review with a concrete implementation concern
candidates.text: A community member brings a repository pull request and asks for review of a specific implementation path. The review can inspect files, identify product direction, and suggest a focused test.
candidates.description: Paraphrased from a real Discord HTML export for privacy. It represents a concrete repo-review request rather than general enthusiasm.

candidates.title: Price emotion prompt without an artifact
candidates.text: A member asks why people are focused on price. The prompt names a real emotional pattern, but it carries no artifact, claim, repo, clip, or next action by itself.
candidates.description: Paraphrased from a real Discord HTML export for privacy. It keeps the public lesson while removing raw room language.

candidates.title: Breakthrough tease without public evidence
candidates.text: A member announces a major breakthrough but withholds the actual claim, result, or supporting artifact from the room.
candidates.description: Paraphrased from a real Discord HTML export for privacy. It represents suspense without evaluable evidence.
